zh.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III是William de Harcla的兒子，於大約1240年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德哈特雷。他於大約1275年與Joan FitzJohn在英國維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國波藍德被列為sheriff of cumberland。他去世於1302年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III是William de Harcla的儿子，于大约1240年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德哈特雷。他于大约1275年与Joan FitzJohn在英国維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国波藍德被列为sheriff of cumberland。他去世于1302年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III was born about 1240, in Hartley, Westmorland, England as the son of William de Harcla. He married Joan FitzJohn about 1275, in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as sheriff of cumberland in Cumberland, England. He died after 1302, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III est né environ 1240, à Hartley, Westmorland, Angleterre, fils de William de Harcla. Il a épousé Joan FitzJohn environ 1275, à Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cumberland à Cumberland, Angleterre. Il est décédé après 1302, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III wurde um 1240 in Hartley, Westmorland, England, als Sohn von William de Harcla geboren. Er hat um 1275 in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England Joan FitzJohn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of cumberland in Cumberland, England aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1302 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III è nato il circa 1240 nel Hartley, Westmorland, England come figlio di William de Harcla. Lui sposato Joan FitzJohn circa 1275, nel Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cumberland nel Cumberland, England. Morì dopo il 1302, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Hartley Castle, Kirkby Stephen, Westmore: イギリスウエストモーランドキルクビー ステフン
ja.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla IIIは約1240年にイギリスウエストモーランドハートリーでWilliam de Harclaの息子として生まれた。約1275年にイギリスウエストモーランドキルクビー ステフンでJoan FitzJohnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスクウンバーランドでの職業はsheriff of cumberlandと記録されている。彼は1302年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III(은)는 대략 1240년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 하틀리에서 William de Harcla의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1275년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 커k비 스티븐에서 Joan FitzJohn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 c벌랜드에서 sheriff of cumberland이었다. 그는 1302년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Of Hartly Castle, Kirkby Stephen, Westmo: Hartley, Westmōringaland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Hartley, Westmorland, Inglaterra filho de William de Harcla. Ele casou-se com Joan FitzJohn aproximadamente 1275, em Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cumberland em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu após 1302, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III родился около 1240 г. в местности хартли, вестморланд, Англия. Его отца звали William de Harcla. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan FitzJohn около 1275 г. в местности киркби стифен, вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of cumberland в местности кумбирланд, Англия. Он умер после 1302 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1240–after 1302 (by 1309): e tusa o le 1240–ina ua ma'ea le 1302

es.lifeSummary: Michael de Harcla III nació aproximadamente 1240, en Hartley, Westmorland, Inglaterra como hijo de William de Harcla. Se casó con Joan FitzJohn aproximadamente 1275, en Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cumberland en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Murió después de 1302, en su pueblo.
